sections.paragraph: pl. אֲרָיִים 1Ki 10:20 elsewhere אֲרָֹות m. ( 1Ki 10:19 2Ch 9:18, 19 2Ch 9:19), a lion, as if, plucking, tearing abroad (see אָרָה I., No. 2 ); Num 24:9 1Sa 17:34, seq.; 2Sa 23:20, etc.; כְּפִיר אֲרָיֹות “a young lion,” Jud. 14:5 נּוּר אֲרָיֹות “lions’ whelp,” Jer 51:38. It furnishes an image both of strength, Num 23:24, and of fierceness and cruelty, Pro 28:15 see Bochart, Hieroz. i. 715, seq. Syr. ܐܰܪܝܐܳ.
